§ 01Transaction Status

This request is sent periodically to keep all legal workstreams on track for the {{companyName}} ESOP transaction. The deal is currently at {{currentGate}} with an expected closing date of {{expectedClosingDate}}.

{{currentGate}}
{{expectedClosingDate}}
{{daysToClose}}

§ 02Document Drafting Status

Please review the status of each key legal document. Update the status column and provide estimated completion dates for any items not yet executed.

Document Status Target Date Notes
ESOP Plan Document {{esopPlanStatus}} {{esopPlanTargetDate}} {{esopPlanNotes}}
Trust Agreement {{trustAgreementStatus}} {{trustAgreementTargetDate}} {{trustAgreementNotes}}
Stock Purchase Agreement {{spaStatus}} {{spaTargetDate}} {{spaNotes}}
Seller Note & Security Agreement {{sellerNoteStatus}} {{sellerNoteTargetDate}} {{sellerNoteNotes}}
Board Resolutions {{boardResStatus}} {{boardResTargetDate}} {{boardResNotes}}
Shareholder Consent (if applicable) {{shareholderStatus}} {{shareholderTargetDate}} {{shareholderNotes}}
Status key: Drafted — first draft complete; In Review — circulating for comments; Executed — signed and final.
§ 03Open Legal Issues

Please confirm the status of the following open items. If any require Forhemit action or seller input, note that in the response column.

A.Entity conversion. Status of LLC-to-C-corp conversion: {{entityConversionStatus}}
B.EIDL lien resolution. Any outstanding SBA EIDL liens: {{eidlStatus}}
C.IP / key contract assignments. Transfer of material contracts and intellectual property: {{ipAssignmentStatus}}
D.Non-compete / employment agreements. Seller and key employee agreements: {{nonCompeteStatus}}
E.Regulatory approvals. Any industry-specific licenses or regulatory filings: {{regulatoryStatus}}
F.Outstanding diligence items. Documents or information still needed from seller: {{diligenceOutstanding}}
§ 04Gate 4 Requirements

Gate 4 (Legal Clearance) triggers the closing schedule. The following items must be complete before Gate 4 can pass:

1.All transaction documents executed (plan, trust, SPA, note, resolutions)
2.ERISA counsel sign-off on fiduciary process documentation
3.Trustee independence confirmation letter on file
4.SBA commitment letter with all conditions satisfied
5.Title and lien searches clear (no unexpected encumbrances)
6.Entity conversion complete and certified
Action requested: Please confirm which items are complete, which need additional time, and any blockers that Forhemit can help resolve.
§ 05Timeline Request

To keep the transaction on schedule, we request estimated completion dates for the following milestones:

{{planDocFinalDate}}
{{allDocsExecDate}}
{{gate4TargetDate}}
{{closingTargetDate}}
